name: Tips for Vlf Starters
recipeIngredient: Full spice rack with herbs, spices, FF sauces, vinegars, FF dressings, etc.
Bread Maker (sweet, spicy, heavy, light breads)
recipeInstructions:
1. Invest in a rice cooker with a steamer insert to easily cook full-fat foods for lunches and meals.
2. Build a comprehensive spice rack with herbs, spices, full-fat sauces, vinegars, and dressings to enhance flavor without additional shopping.
3. Stock your pantry with canned vegetables, full-fat snacks, and frozen vegetables for convenient meal options.
4. Use a bread maker to create various full-fat breads that are fresh and appealing.
5. Purchase The Ornish book for gourmet-inspired recipes that fit the VLF lifestyle.
6. Join this mailing list for ongoing support and benefits without any additional cost.
Note on Cost:
After initial investments, healthy ingredients have become cheaper than before, resulting in overall savings despite the upfront costs.
